displayProperties.name: Weapons
displayProperties.description: Increases weapon reload speed and handling. Increases weapon damage against minor and major combatants.

displayProperties.name: Melee
displayProperties.description: Reduces your melee cooldown. Increases the amount of melee energy from all sources.

displayProperties.name: Super
displayProperties.description: Increases the amount of Super energy from all sources.

displayProperties.name: Health
displayProperties.description: Increases the amount of health you gain each time you pick up an Orb of Power. Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming a weapon.

displayProperties.name: Grenade
displayProperties.description: Reduces your grenade ability cooldown. Increases the amount of grenade energy from all sources.

displayProperties.name: Class
displayProperties.description: Reduces your class ability cooldown. Increases the amount of class ability energy provided by all sources.
